item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h Flying into Scotland.
Always enjoy seeing the golf courses from the air. This time ar
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h Flying into Scotland.
Always enjoy seeing the golf courses from the air. This time around it's the two courses at Loch Lomond.
(Feels like we need a 9-holer on that island too) 6 1 46 5 mil
